data.title: Binance Wallet Launches BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition on Binance Alpha
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Wallet launched the BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition on Binance Alpha. Trading B2, AIOT, MYX and ZKJ in Binance Wallet (without private key) or through Binance Alpha can share token rewards. The event time is: 23:00 on May 7, 2025 to 00:00 on May 22, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8). Participants will be ranked according to four independent categories: 
B2 Trading Volume Pool: The top 5,000 users in terms of B2 token trading volume during the event will share 883,000 B2 tokens (= 176 B2 per user). 
AIOT Trading Volume Pool: The top 10,000 users in terms of AIOT token trading volume during the event will share 2,306,000 AIOT tokens (= 230 AIOT per user). 
MYX Volume Pool: The top 5,000 users in terms of MYX token trading volume during the event will share 5,117,000 MYX tokens (= 1,023 MYX per user).
ZKJ Volume Pool: The top 20,000 users in terms of ZKJ token trading volume during the event will share 700,000 ZKJ tokens (= 35 ZKJ per user).
Please note:
Only transactions through Binance Wallet (no private key) or Binance Alpha are eligible for this event, third-party dApp transactions are not included.
No Volume Cap: There is no upper limit on the trading volume per participant in this event.
The rewards in this event are not mutually exclusive, and eligible winners can receive rewards from each trading task pool if they meet the above criteria.
Transactions related to cross-chain bridges are not counted towards the trading volume of this event.

data.title: Greeks.live: Traders are bracing for a potential downside move
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released an English community briefing, which pointed out that the group seems to be bearish and traders are preparing for a potential downward trend. Many members are paying attention to the price range of Bitcoin between $93,000 and $99,000 and expressed a lack of enthusiasm for the current volatile market conditions.

data.title: SUI Crypto Bulls Eye $3.45 as Momentum Gathers, But Caution Lingers
data.description:
SUI crypto shows signs of renewed bullish strength on the daily chart, but fading momentum and nearby resistance may cap gains.

The post SUI Crypto Bulls Eye $3. 45 as Momentum Gathers, But Caution Lingers first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Apple Explores AI Search Integration in Browser
data.description: According to PANews, Apple is considering the integration of artificial intelligence search capabilities into its browser, as stated by Apple's Senior Vice President, Cue. This development highlights the company's ongoing efforts to enhance user experience through advanced technology.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant: Digital assets will demand up to $2 trillion for U.S. Treasuries
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said that the demand for U.S. Treasury bonds from digital assets will be as high as $2 trillion. (Jinshi)

data.title: Arizona Senate Approves Bitcoin Reserve Bill Awaiting Governor's Decision
data.description: According to Odaily, the Arizona Senate has approved the Bitcoin Reserve Bill SB 1373, which now awaits the final decision from Governor Katie Hobbs. Previously, Governor Hobbs had vetoed another strategic Bitcoin reserve bill, SB 1025.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Highlights Digital Assets' Impact on Treasury Demand
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent has stated that the demand for U.S. Treasury bonds driven by digital assets could reach $2 trillion. This significant figure underscores the growing influence of digital assets on traditional financial markets. The integration of digital assets into the financial ecosystem is expected to have substantial implications for the demand and management of U.S. government debt. As digital assets continue to evolve, their role in shaping economic and financial strategies remains a key area of focus for policymakers and financial institutions.

data.title: NPC Crypto Poised For MAJOR Bounce: Will NPC Price Breakout Trigger Meme Coin Season?
data.description:
Non-Playable Coin, NPC crypto, is steadily working its way toward recovery. After bottoming out at $0. 0058 in early March 2025, NPC surged to nearly $0. 019: a 229% gain in just 50 days
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/presales/npc-crypto-poised-for-major-bounce-will-npc-price-breakout-trigger-meme-coin-season/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation co-executive directors launch venture capital firm Lantern Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Tomasz Stańczak, co-executive director of the Ethereum Foundation, announced on the X platform that he had established an early-stage venture capital firm, Lantern Capital, with Gökhan and Nethermind. He will join Lantern Capital as a general partner of the investment committee on behalf of Nethermind. Lantern Capital will support founders in creating the next wave of applications and experiences, allowing AI systems to interact effectively with blockchains, with a focus on achieving secure and verifiable coordination, including enhancing the agent experience (AX) and ensuring that the underlying infrastructure can reliably support these more dynamic use cases.

data.title: Arizona Senate Approves Bitcoin Reserve Bill SB 1373
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Arizona Senate approved the Bitcoin Reserve Bill SB 1373 and sent it to Governor Katie Hobbs for final decision. It is reported that Katie Hobbs had previously vetoed another strategic Bitcoin reserve bill in the state, SB 1025. (Bitcoin News)

data.title: Revolut to Introduce Bitcoin Lightning Network Payments in Europe
data.description:
According to Foresight News, digital bank Revolut has announced a partnership with Lightspark to launch a Bitcoin Lightning Network-based payment feature in the UK and select European Economic Area countries. This initiative aims to reduce transaction fees and expedite payment processing by leveraging Lightspark's payment infrastructure. 

To access the Lightning payment feature, users must complete KYC verification and hold Bitcoin in their Revolut accounts. The upgraded app will facilitate this new payment method.

Lightspark, led by former PayPal executive David Marcus, focuses on developing global payment solutions using the Bitcoin Lightning Network. Revolut has not yet disclosed the specific launch date for this feature.

data.title: Google Identifies New Malware Capable of File Theft
data.description: According to Odaily, Google's Threat Intelligence Group has identified a new malware named LostKeys. This malware is capable of stealing files from hard-coded extensions and directory lists.

data.title: Bitcoin's April Performance Shows Resilience Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description:
According to Odaily, ARK Investment Management released its April 2025 Bitcoin report, highlighting mixed signals from inflation, market sentiment, and tariffs regarding economic prospects. The report indicates that Bitcoin's price rose by approximately 14% in April, outperforming the S&P 500 index and quickly rebounding from tariff-induced market panic. Additionally, the report notes that Bitcoin's current price correction has not exceeded 30%, technically remaining within a bull market range. If Bitcoin were to fall 30%, 50%, and 70% from its historical high, the corresponding price levels would be approximately $74,311, $53,080, and $31,848, respectively.

Furthermore, the number of unrealized loss Bitcoins held by long-term holders (LTH) is close to 3.5 million, the highest level since 2018, suggesting the market may be oversold. ARK maintains a bullish outlook on this data. The report also mentions that the current profitable supply ratio of Bitcoin has not exceeded 68%, significantly lower than the over 80% level seen at historical peaks, indicating no signs of irrational exuberance in the market. Overall, on-chain data reflects that the market is in a healthy consolidation phase.

data.title: Google identifies new malware, LostKeys, that steals files from hardcoded extensions and directory lists
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Google Threat Intelligence Team has identified a new malware called LostKeys, which can steal files from hardcoded extensions and directory lists. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale withdrew 1,402 ETH from Binance after being silent for 2 months, worth $2.56 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a whale withdrew 1,402 ETH worth $2.56 million from Binance after being silent for 2 months, facing a loss of about $6 million. The whale currently holds 6,653 ETH (US$12.17 million), which is the accumulated amount over the past 10 months.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 132 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 10,287 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 132 BTC today, of which Grayscale GBTC had an outflow of 181 BTC. Currently, GBTC holds 190,229 BTC, worth US$18.46 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 10,287 ETH, of which Fidelity had an outflow of 9,991 ETH. Currently, Fidelity holds 413,405 ETH, worth approximately US$755.7 million.

data.title: Trade Tensions Ease as U.S. and China Move Toward Negotiations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the SPX index achieved a historic nine-week winning streak, recovering all losses since the Liberation Day crash, as the U.S. government softened its stance on trade policies. Both the U.S. and China are making efforts to resume trade talks, with recent adjustments in trade departments and negotiators. China has acknowledged receiving messages from the U.S. expressing a desire to negotiate, which it is currently evaluating.

A Bloomberg survey indicates that the market expects the Trump administration to eventually respond to market changes, despite previous attempts to blame issues on Biden's legacy. The market believes the government has reached a 'pain threshold' that may lead to a pause in tariff actions.

Positive signals from trade discussions were complemented by a surprisingly strong non-farm employment report released last Friday, boosting market risk appetite. The report showed an increase of 177,000 jobs in April, with the unemployment rate steady at 4.2%, alleviating immediate recession fears. However, the true impact of tariff policies might only be evident in data from May to June.

The stock market's rebound suggests an implied recession probability of only 8%, much lower than economists' estimates or fixed-income market implications. In the fixed-income market, the yield curve has flattened to February levels, with a 30% chance of a rate cut in June and only about three cuts expected for the year.

Meanwhile, actual inflation data continues to decline, and positive signals from central banks regarding U.S. debt holdings have stabilized the bond market. In the cryptocurrency sector, overall volatility remained low last week, with prices stable. Although BTC briefly reclaimed the 96k level, it faced short-term profit-taking pressure. The volatility curve flattened, indicating a lack of clear market direction, with actual volatility at its lowest point this year.

If macro assets remain stable, cryptocurrency prices are expected to consolidate in the short term, with a potential bullish bias in the medium term. Despite modest inflows, ETF funds have seen positive net inflows, nearly surpassing early first-quarter highs.

Looking ahead, with the SPX recovering post-Liberation Day losses, the 'easy' part of the rebound is complete, and prices are entering a technical resistance zone. Historically, bear market rallies are volatile and irrational, but this rapid rebound has triggered positive divergence signals that could push prices back to January highs.

The upcoming FOMC meeting is not expected to significantly impact the market, with no clear direction anticipated. Ultimately, market movements will depend on corporate earnings growth, which is projected to reach nearly 13% year-over-year in the first quarter, doubling early earnings season expectations and marking the second consecutive quarter of double-digit growth.

If forced to choose, the 'pain trade' remains further price increases, as most observers remain fixated on the irreversible nature of tariffs. However, caution is advised, as bear market rallies can be deceptive.

data.title: ARK Invest: Bitcoin outperformed the S&P 500 in April, and although the price has fallen, it has rebounded quickly
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News ARK Investment Management released a Bitcoin reading report for April 2025, which pointed out that the economic outlook signals sent by inflation, market sentiment and tariffs were mixed, but data showed that the price of Bitcoin rose by about 14% in April, outperforming the S&P 500 index and rebounding quickly from the market panic caused by tariffs.
In addition, the report also mentioned that the current price correction of Bitcoin has not exceeded 30%, and it is still in the bull market range technically. If it falls by 30%, 50% and 70% from the historical high, the corresponding price levels are about US$74,311, US$53,080 and US$31,848 respectively. In addition, the number of unrealized loss bitcoins held by long-term holders (LTH) is close to 3.5 million, the highest level since 2018, indicating that the market may be oversold, and ARK holds a "bullish" view on this. The report also mentioned that the current profitable supply ratio of Bitcoin does not exceed 68%, which is far lower than the level of more than 80% at the historical top, indicating that the market has not yet shown signs of irrational prosperity. Overall, on-chain data reflects that the market is in a healthy consolidation phase. (ARK Invest)

data.title: Gnosis Chain: xDAI bridge will use USDS as the default token on the Ethereum chain, and the migration is expected to take effect on June 8
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Gnosis Chain posted on the X platform that third-party applications need to take action, and the xDAI bridge contract is undergoing a key upgrade: on Ethereum, DAI will be replaced by USDS as the default accepted token, and xDAI will continue to be minted on Gnosis Chain. Third-party applications must complete integration with the new Bridge Router contract on Ethereum before June 8, 2025.

data.title: Union Restores Wallet Functionality Amid Ongoing Monitoring
data.description: According to Foresight News, Union, a modular interoperability layer, has announced that its wallet functionality has been restored. Engineers are actively monitoring the situation to ensure continued stability. This follows an earlier disclosure by Union, made one hour prior, regarding an anomaly in the wallet function that was under repair.
